name: @configuredthings/rdp.js
description: A minimal typed base class for writing recursive descent parsers in TypeScript, with a focus on ease of use and extensibility. Also includes a CLI tool that can generate parsers from EBNF or ABNF grammars, with support for generating scaffolding for tree walkers, interpreters, facades, semantic validation piepelines, and two-way transformers

scripts.prebuild: npm run clean && npm run generate:grammars
scripts.docs: npm --prefix docs-site run render-header && npx --prefix docs-site typedoc
scripts.generate:meta: mkdir -p src/parsers/generated && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/ebnf-meta.ebnf --parser-name EBNFInEBNFParser --output src/parsers/generated/ebnf-in-ebnf-parser.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/ebnf-meta.abnf --parser-name EBNFInABNFParser --output src/parsers/generated/ebnf-in-abnf-parser.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/abnf-meta.ebnf --parser-name ABNFInEBNFParser --output src/parsers/generated/abnf-in-ebnf-parser.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/abnf-meta.abnf --parser-name ABNFInABNFParser --output src/parsers/generated/abnf-in-abnf-parser.ts
scripts.generate:examples: mkdir -p examples/arith && cp src/grammars/arith.ebnf examples/arith/arith.ebnf && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --parser-name ArithParser --tree-name ArithTree --output examples/arith/ArithParser.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --parser-name ArithParser --traversal interpreter --output examples/arith/arith-evaluator.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --parser-name ArithParser --traversal interpreter --facade --output examples/arith/arith-facade.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --parser-name ArithParser --traversal tree-walker --pipeline --output examples/arith/arith-pipeline.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --parser-name ArithParser --tree-name ArithTree --traversal tree-walker --output examples/arith/arith-walker.ts && node dist/esm/cli/rdp-gen.js src/grammars/arith.ebnf --ast-only --output examples/arith/arith-ast.json
